description: Synthetic HL7 v2.3 ORU^R01 result message carried over MLLP — exercises the MLLP frame/de-frame round-trip (LIS-13 / S1.1). NOT a real instrument capture.

source.note: Application payload only — the MllpTransport applies the 0x0B…0x1C 0x0D envelope at replay time. Real RAYTO RAC-050 captures replace this synthetic seed in LIS-20 (bench conformance), set synthetic:false with a capture reference.
